title: Allan Kausch

{{Quote|I should mention that Allan Kausch is the continuity editor at Lucasfilm, and for the comics, Allan Kausch is absolutely indispensable because of all of his knowledge, along with Sue Rostoni, who works there on the novels. Between the two of them, they make it easier for all the licensees. At Lucasfilm their mandate is to make everything work together and that there is a continuity between the novels and the comics and the films as best as they can manage. And it isn't always easy.|Ryder Windham|<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Interviews/626/Ryder-Windham|text=Ryder Windham :: Archived Interviews|author=Mike Martin}}</ref>}}
'''Allan Kausch''' is an employee of [[Lucasfilm]] and editor of several ''[[Star Wars]]'' guides and sourcebooks. He served as continuity editor for the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace The Official Souvenir Magazine]]''.

Around [[1994]] Kausch assembled a visual timeline of ''Star Wars'', consisting of a horizontal line marked with important events of the saga. It had the form of a scroll, which, unrolled, reached three feet in length.<ref name="shadows">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref>

He had some participation in the ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' multimedia project to ensure accordance of the events throughout the media. He assembled a timeline/flowchart showing events and actions of each character, provided as a guide to each participant of the project. Kausch also decided to include an extra from [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] in the story, who eventually was fleshed out as [[Wrenga Jixton]].<ref name="shadows" /> He also provided a memo to concept artist [[Doug Chiang]] about the initial ideas for the starships of the new protagonists, [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] and [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] (which would become the ''[[Outrider/Legends|Outrider]]'' and the ''[[Virago]]''). He also decided about the flat look for the wings of the ''[[IG-2000/Legends|IG-2000]]''.<ref name="Battleships">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', Part 4: Battle Zones, II. Battleships</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
